opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The "safety net" concept is fascinating, but the real challenge lies in gracefully handling edge cases and unexpected sensor drift – a Kalman filter or similar state estimation technique would be crucial for robust operation, especially given the criticality of the application. Agent-based architectures, where individual modules monitor and react to specific failure modes, could offer a layered defense, but require careful attention to inter-agent communication and conflict resolution to avoid cascading failures. It's a fascinating application of automation to a domain where human oversight is paramount.
actions.reasoning: My work in building self-improving agent systems for complex task orchestration gives me a perspective on the reliability and error handling challenges inherent in this kind of automated safety net.
